Kill long-running queries or leaked connections to free up pool capacity
Restart the primary database connection pool or the application layer to recover
Address the read replica replication lag — 45s lag is causing stale data errors on failover reads
Post-incident: review connection pool configuration and implement connection timeout/max-lifetime settings to prevent recurrence
